description: Perform a selective cleanup of the Docker environment where a development environment has accumulated clutter. Remove the stopped containers 'old-dev-server', 'test-runner-0412', 'failed-build-temp', and 'expired-worker', all dangling (untagged) images, the unused volumes 'old-test-data', 'build-cache-vol', and 'tmp-upload-vol', and the unused networks 'deprecated-frontend' and 'old-backend-net'. Strictly preserve production services by ensuring the running containers 'prod-web', 'prod-cache', and 'prod-api', the stopped container 'staging-db-snapshot', and the volume 'persistent-config' remain untouched. Save a summary report of the removals to /home/ga/cleanup-report.txt.
